<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>CotiTech — Cotizador Técnico</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{--bg:#f0f2f5;--white:#fff;--dark:#1a1f2e;--dark2:#141927;--border:#dce0e6;--accent:#1a56db;--accent-bg:#e8effc;--green:#0d7a3e;--green-bg:#dff5e8;--amber:#b45309;--amber-bg:#fef3c7;--red:#c0392b;--red-bg:#fde8e8;--purple:#7c3aed;--purple-bg:#ede9fe;--txt:#1f2937;--txt2:#5f6b7a;--txt3:#9ca3af;--mono:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;--sans:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
body{font-family:var(--sans);background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt);}

/* ══ TOPBAR ══ */
.topbar{background:var(--dark);color:white;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 1.2rem;height:54px;gap:0;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;}
.brand{font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;margin-right:1.5rem;white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;}
.brand .dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:#3b82f6;border-radius:50%;}

/* Dropdown nav */
.nav-group{display:flex;gap:0.15rem;align-items:center;}
.nav-dd{position:relative;}
.nav-dd-btn{background:none;border:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);padding:0.5rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.35rem;white-space:nowrap;}
.nav-dd-btn:hover,.nav-dd-btn.open{color:white;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
.nav-dd-btn.active-parent{color:white;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);}
.nav-dd-btn .arrow{font-size:0.6rem;transition:transform 0.2s;}
.nav-dd-btn.open .arrow{transform:rotate(180deg);}
.nav-dd-menu{display:none;position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 4px);left:0;background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:8px;min-width:220px;padding:0.3rem;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);z-index:200;}
.nav-dd-menu.show{display:block;animation:ddIn 0.15s ease;}
@keyframes ddIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-4px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.nav-dd-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6rem;padding:0.55rem 0.75rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.1s;}
.nav-dd-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:white;}
.nav-dd-item.active{background:rgba(37,99,235,0.2);color:#93bbfc;}
.nav-dd-item.disabled{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);cursor:default;}
.nav-dd-item.disabled:hover{background:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}
.nav-dd-item .ico{width:20px;text-align:center;font-size:0.9rem;}
.nav-dd-item .badge-soon{font-size:0.6rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);padding:0.1rem 0.35rem;border-radius:3px;margin-left:auto;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;font-weight:600;}
.nav-sep{height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);margin:0.25rem 0.5rem;}
.nav-flat{background:none;border:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);padding:0.5rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;white-space:nowrap;}
.nav-flat:hover{color:white;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);}
.nav-flat.active{color:white;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);}

.container{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.5rem;}
.module{display:none;animation:fadeUp 0.3s ease;}.module.active{display:block;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.sec-title{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.3rem;}
.sec-sub{color:var(--txt2);font-size:0.88rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;}
.card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:1rem;overflow:hidden;}
.card-h{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0.75rem 1rem;border-bottom:1px solid #eef0f3;background:#fafbfc;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;color:var(--txt2);}
.card-h .count{background:var(--accent-bg);color:var(--accent);font-size:0.72rem;padding:0.1rem 0.45rem;border-radius:99px;margin-left:0.4rem;}
.card-b{padding:1rem;}
table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.83rem;}
thead th{text-align:left;padding:0.5rem 0.6rem;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;color:var(--txt3);border-bottom:2px solid var(--border);white-space:nowrap;}
tbody td{padding:0.5rem 0.6rem;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f2f4;}
tbody tr:hover{background:#f8f9fb;}
.mono{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:0.82rem;}
.chip{display:inline-block;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.12rem 0.45rem;border-radius:4px;text-transform:capitalize;}
.chip-blue{background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8;}.chip-pink{background:#fce7f3;color:#be185d;}.chip-green{background:#d1fae5;color:#047857;}.chip-amber{background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e;}.chip-purple{background:#e0e7ff;color:#4338ca;}.chip-orange{background:#ffedd5;color:#9a3412;}.chip-gray{background:#f1f5f9;color:#475569;}
.exp-chip{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:0.73rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--amber-bg);color:var(--amber);padding:0.15rem 0.45rem;border-radius:4px;}
.f-label{display:block;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;margin-bottom:0.25rem;}
.f-input,.f-select{width:100%;padding:0.5rem 0.6rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--txt);background:white;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.15s;}
.f-input:focus,.f-select:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(26,86,219,0.1);}
.f-input[readonly]{background:#f8fafc;color:var(--txt2);}
.f-input::placeholder{color:#c0c7d0;}
textarea.f-input{resize:vertical;min-height:80px;line-height:1.5;}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.35rem;padding:0.45rem 0.85rem;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;}
.btn-p{background:var(--accent);color:white;}.btn-p:hover{background:#1648b8;}
.btn-g{background:var(--green);color:white;}.btn-g:hover{background:#0a6331;}
.btn-o{background:transparent;color:var(--accent);border:1px solid var(--border);}.btn-o:hover{background:var(--accent-bg);}
.btn-d{background:transparent;color:var(--red);border:1px solid #f5c6c6;}.btn-d:hover{background:var(--red-bg);}
.btn-purple{background:var(--purple);color:white;}.btn-purple:hover{background:#6d28d9;}
.btn-sm{padding:0.3rem 0.55rem;font-size:0.75rem;}
.btn-disabled{opacity:0.4;cursor:not-allowed;pointer-events:none;}
.add-bar{display:flex;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.7rem;border-top:1px dashed var(--border);flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:end;}
.add-bar .fg{flex:1;min-width:90px;}
.add-bar .fg label{font-size:0.63rem;}
.add-bar .fg input,.add-bar .fg select{padding:0.4rem 0.5rem;font-size:0.82rem;}
.q-builder{background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.q-builder-title{font-weight:600;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--txt2);margin-bottom:0.7rem;}
.q-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:0.7rem;margin-bottom:0.6rem;}
.q-preview{display:none;margin-top:0.7rem;padding:0.6rem 0.8rem;background:var(--accent-bg);border-radius:7px;font-size:0.84rem;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.q-preview.show{display:flex;}
.q-preview .qp-label{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;}
.q-preview .qp-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;color:#1648b8;font-size:0.95rem;}
.ind-pct-input{width:65px;text-align:center;padding:0.35rem 0.4rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:0.82rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;outline:none;background:white;}
.ind-pct-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
.ind-fixed-input{width:110px;text-align:right;padding:0.35rem 0.5rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:0.82rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;outline:none;background:white;}
.ind-fixed-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
.ind-type-label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--txt3);font-weight:500;}
.ind-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;font-size:0.85rem;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;}
.ind-val.highlight{color:var(--accent);font-size:0.9rem;}
.totals-bar{background:var(--dark);color:white;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr));margin-top:1rem;}
.totals-bar .ti{padding:1rem;}.totals-bar .ti .tl{font-size:0.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);margin-bottom:0.2rem;}
.totals-bar .ti .tv{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:600;}
.totals-bar .ti.hl .tv{color:#34d399;font-size:1.35rem;}
.diagram-wrap{display:none;margin-top:1rem;padding:1rem;background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow-x:auto;}
.diagram-wrap.show{display:block;animation:fadeUp 0.3s ease;}
.diagram-wrap h4{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);margin-bottom:0.8rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;}
.actions-bar{display:flex;gap:0.5rem;margin-top:0.8rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.empty{text-align:center;padding:2rem;color:var(--txt3);font-size:0.85rem;}.empty-ico{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:0.3rem;opacity:0.35;}
.ai-output{background:#faf5ff;border:1px solid #e9d5ff;border-radius:8px;padding:1rem;margin-top:0.6rem;font-size:0.88rem;line-height:1.6;color:var(--txt);white-space:pre-wrap;display:none;}
.ai-output.show{display:block;animation:fadeUp 0.3s ease;}
.ai-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3rem;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--purple);margin-bottom:0.4rem;}
.loading-dots{display:inline-flex;gap:3px;}.loading-dots span{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--purple);border-radius:50%;animation:bounce 1.2s infinite;}.loading-dots span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:0.15s;}.loading-dots span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:0.3s;}
@keyframes bounce{0%,80%,100%{transform:scale(0.6);opacity:0.4}40%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}
.margin-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;padding:0.7rem 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin-top:0.5rem;}
.margin-row label{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);}

/* Diagnostic blocks */
.diag-block{border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin:8px 10px;overflow:hidden;animation:fadeUp 0.3s ease;}
.diag-block-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 12px;background:#f8fafc;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.diag-block-head select{border:none;background:transparent;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt);cursor:pointer;outline:none;}
.diag-block-body{padding:10px 12px;}
.diag-textarea{width:100%;min-height:70px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--txt);resize:vertical;outline:none;line-height:1.5;}
.diag-textarea:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(26,86,219,0.1);}
.diag-ai-bar{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;align-items:center;}
.diag-ai-output{background:#faf5ff;border:1px solid #e9d5ff;border-radius:6px;padding:10px;margin-top:8px;font-size:0.85rem;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;display:none;}
.diag-ai-output.show{display:block;animation:fadeUp 0.3s ease;}
.diag-ai-badge{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--purple);margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.diag-table-wrap{margin-top:8px;}
.diag-table-wrap table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.82rem;}
.diag-table-wrap th{background:#f0f4f8;padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);border:1px solid var(--border);}
.diag-table-wrap td{padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.diag-table-wrap input{width:100%;border:none;background:transparent;font-family:var(--sans);font-size:0.82rem;padding:2px 0;outline:none;}
.diag-img-zone{margin-top:8px;border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;background:#fafbfc;}
.diag-img-zone:hover{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-bg);}
.diag-img-zone input[type=file]{display:none;}
.diag-img-zone .diz-text{font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--txt3);}
.diag-img-zone .diz-text strong{color:var(--accent);}
.diag-img-preview{margin-top:8px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;}
.diag-img-preview img{max-width:200px;max-height:150px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);object-fit:cover;}

/* Config page */
.cfg-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:220px 1fr;gap:1rem;min-height:500px;}
@media(max-width:768px){.cfg-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.cfg-sidebar{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:0.5rem;height:fit-content;}
.cfg-nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;padding:0.55rem 0.7rem;border-radius:7px;font-size:0.84rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--txt2);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.12s;}
.cfg-nav-item:hover{background:#f0f4f8;color:var(--txt);}
.cfg-nav-item.active{background:var(--accent-bg);color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;}
.cfg-nav-item .ci{width:20px;text-align:center;font-size:0.9rem;}
.cfg-nav-label{font-size:0.65rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--txt3);padding:0.7rem 0.7rem 0.3rem;font-weight:600;}
.cfg-panel{display:none;animation:fadeUp 0.25s ease;}.cfg-panel.active{display:block;}

/* Placeholder modules */
.placeholder{text-align:center;padding:4rem 2rem;color:var(--txt3);}
.placeholder .ph-ico{font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;opacity:0.3;}
.placeholder h3{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);margin-bottom:0.3rem;}

@media(max-width:700px){.container{padding:0.8rem;}.q-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ══ TOPBAR ══ -->
<div class="topbar">
  <div class="brand" onclick="go('proyectos')"><span class="dot"></span> CotiTech</div>
  <div class="nav-group">
    <!-- Cotizadores dropdown -->
    <div class="nav-dd" id="ddCoti">
      <button class="nav-dd-btn" onclick="toggleDD('ddCoti')">
        Cotizadores <span class="arrow">▾</span>
      </button>
      <div class="nav-dd-menu" id="ddCoti-menu">
        <div class="nav-dd-item" data-mod="proyectos" onclick="go('proyectos')"><span class="ico">📐</span> Proyectos</div>
        <div class="nav-dd-item" data-mod="servicios" onclick="go('servicios')"><span class="ico">🔧</span> Servicios Generales</div>
        <div class="nav-sep"></div>
        <div class="nav-dd-item" data-mod="polizas" onclick="go('polizas')"><span class="ico">📋</span> Pólizas Mantenimiento</div>
        <div class="nav-dd-item disabled" data-mod="dispensadores"><span class="ico">💧</span> Renta Dispensadores <span class="badge-soon">Pronto</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Configuración -->
    <button class="nav-flat" onclick="go('config')">⚙️ Configuración</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container">

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- ════ COTIZADOR PROYECTOS ════ -->
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="module active" id="mod-proyectos">
  <h2 class="sec-title">Cotizador de Proyectos</h2>
  <p class="sec-sub">Selecciona equipos del catálogo, define flujo requerido y agrega costos indirectos.</p>
  <div class="q-builder">
    <div class="q-builder-title">Agregar Equipo al Proyecto</div>
    <div class="q-row">
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Equipo (catálogo)</label><select class="f-select" id="qEquip" onchange="onQEquipChange()"><option value="">— Seleccionar —</option></select></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Flujo Ref. (S₁)</label><input class="f-input" id="qS1" readonly></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Costo Ref. (C₁)</label><input class="f-input" id="qC1" readonly></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Factor (n)</label><input class="f-input" id="qN" readonly></div>
    </div>
    <div class="q-row">
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Flujo Requerido (S₂)</label><input class="f-input" id="qS2" type="number" step="any" placeholder="Flujo deseado" oninput="qPreview()"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Cantidad</label><input class="f-input" id="qQty" type="number" value="1" min="1" oninput="qPreview()"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Notas</label><input class="f-input" id="qNotes" placeholder="Opcional"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="q-preview" id="qPreviewBar">
      <div><div class="qp-label">Costo Unit.</div><div class="qp-val" id="qpUnit">$0</div></div>
      <div><div class="qp-label">Subtotal</div><div class="qp-val" id="qpTotal">$0</div></div>
      <div style="margin-left:auto"><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addLine()">+ Agregar</button></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Partidas de Equipos <span class="count" id="lineCount">0</span></span><button class="btn btn-d btn-sm" onclick="clearLines()">Limpiar</button></div><div style="overflow-x:auto"><table><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Tag</th><th>Equipo</th><th>Flujo Ref→Req</th><th>n</th><th>Cant</th><th>Cost Unit</th><th>Subtotal</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="linesBody"></tbody></table></div><div class="empty" id="linesEmpty"><div class="empty-ico">📐</div>Agrega equipos desde el panel superior</div></div>
  <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Costos Indirectos</span><button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="go('config');setTimeout(()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.cfg-nav-item')[2].click()},100)" title="Editar catálogo de indirectos">⚙️ Editar Catálogo</button></div><div class="card-b" style="padding:0"><table><thead><tr><th style="width:40px">#</th><th>Concepto</th><th style="width:50px">Cant</th><th style="width:80px">Tipo</th><th style="width:90px">% ó Monto</th><th style="width:120px;text-align:right">Costo Unit.</th><th style="width:120px;text-align:right">Subtotal</th></tr></thead><tbody id="indBody"></tbody><tfoot><tr style="background:#f0f4f8;border-top:2px solid var(--border)"><td colspan="5"></td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:700;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--txt2)">TOTAL INDIRECTOS</td><td class="ind-val highlight" id="indTotal" style="padding:0.6rem">$0</td></tr></tfoot></table></div></div>
  <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Costo Financiero — Días de Crédito</span></div><div class="card-b">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.8rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <label class="f-label" style="margin:0">Días de Crédito:</label>
      <input class="ind-pct-input" type="number" id="pCreditDays" value="0" min="0" step="1" oninput="calcTotals()" style="width:70px">
      <span style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--txt3)">días × 0.05% diario (18% anual)</span>
      <span class="mono" style="font-weight:600;color:var(--amber);margin-left:auto" id="pCreditAmt">$0.00</span>
    </div>
  </div></div>
  <div class="totals-bar"><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Total Equipos</div><div class="tv" id="tEquip">$0.00</div></div><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Total Indirectos</div><div class="tv" id="tInd">$0.00</div></div><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Costo Financiero</div><div class="tv" id="tCredit" style="color:#f59e0b;">$0.00</div></div><div class="ti hl"><div class="tl">Total Proyecto</div><div class="tv" id="tProj">$0.00</div></div><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Factor Lang (Proyecto ÷ Equipos)</div><div class="tv" id="tLang" style="color:#f59e0b;">—</div><div style="font-size:0.65rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);margin-top:0.2rem;" id="tLangRef">Ref: Sólidos 3.10 | Mixto 3.63 | Fluidos 4.74</div></div></div>
  <div class="actions-bar"><button class="btn btn-o" onclick="toggleDiagram()">📊 Diagrama de Bloques</button><button class="btn btn-g btn-disabled">📄 Generar Propuesta</button></div>
  <div class="diagram-wrap" id="diagramWrap"><h4>Diagrama de Bloques</h4><div id="diagramSvg"></div></div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- ════ SERVICIOS GENERALES ════ -->
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="module" id="mod-servicios">
  <h2 class="sec-title">Cotizador de Servicios Generales</h2>
  <p class="sec-sub">Cotiza servicios de mantenimiento con descripción profesional, mano de obra y materiales.</p>
  <!-- Parte 1 -->
  <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Parte 1 — Descripción del Servicio</span></div><div class="card-b">
    <div class="fg" style="margin-bottom:0.6rem"><label class="f-label">Nombre del Servicio</label><input class="f-input" id="svcName" placeholder="Ej: Mantenimiento a Filtro Zeolita"></div>
    <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Describe el trabajo con tus palabras</label><textarea class="f-input" id="svcRaw" placeholder="Ej: Sacar material del filtro, lijar por dentro, pintar epóxico, cargar material nuevo..."></textarea></div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.6rem;display:flex;gap:0.5rem;align-items:center">
      <button class="btn btn-purple" onclick="enhanceText()" id="aiBtn">✨ Mejorar con IA</button>
      <span id="aiLoading" style="display:none"><span class="loading-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></span> <span style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--purple);margin-left:0.3rem">Procesando...</span></span>
    </div>
    <div class="ai-output" id="aiOutput"><div class="ai-badge"><span class="spark">✨</span> Descripción Profesional (editable)</div><div contenteditable="true" id="aiText" style="outline:none"></div></div>
  </div></div>
  <!-- Parte 2 -->
  <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Parte 2 — Mano de Obra <span class="count" id="moCount">0</span></span></div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto"><table><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Rol</th><th>Tarifa Diaria</th><th>Días</th><th>Personas</th><th style="text-align:right">Subtotal</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="moBody"></tbody></table></div>
    <div class="empty" id="moEmpty"><div class="empty-ico">👷</div>Agrega personal</div>
    <div class="add-bar">
      <div class="fg" style="flex:2"><label class="f-label">Seleccionar del Catálogo</label><select class="f-select" id="moSel"><option value="">— Seleccionar —</option></select></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Días</label><input class="f-input" id="moDias" type="number" value="1" min="1"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Personas</label><input class="f-input" id="moPers" type="number" value="1" min="1"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addMO()">+ Agregar</button></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Parte 3 -->
  <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Parte 3 — Materiales y Consumibles <span class="count" id="matSvcCount">0</span></span></div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto"><table><thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Material / Equipo</th><th>Cant</th><th>Unidad</th><th>Precio Unit.</th><th style="text-align:right">Subtotal</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="matSvcBody"></tbody></table></div>
    <div class="empty" id="matSvcEmpty"><div class="empty-ico">🔩</div>Agrega materiales</div>
    <div class="add-bar">
      <div class="fg" style="flex:2"><label class="f-label">Descripción</label><input class="f-input" id="mDesc" placeholder="Tubería PVC 2 pulg"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Cant</label><input class="f-input" id="mCant" type="number" step="any" value="1"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Unidad</label><input class="f-input" id="mUnidad" value="pza"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Precio Unit. MXN</label><input class="f-input" id="mPrecio" type="number" step="any"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addMatSvc()">+ Agregar</button></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Parte 4 -->
  <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Parte 4 — Resumen</span></div><div class="card-b">
    <div class="margin-row"><label>Margen de Utilidad:</label><input class="ind-pct-input" type="number" id="svcMargin" value="20" min="0" oninput="calcSvcTotals()"><span style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--txt3)">%</span></div>
    <div class="margin-row"><label>Días de Crédito:</label><input class="ind-pct-input" type="number" id="sCreditDays" value="0" min="0" oninput="calcSvcTotals()" style="width:70px"><span style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--txt3)">días × 0.05% diario (18% anual)</span><span class="mono" style="font-weight:600;color:var(--amber);margin-left:auto" id="sCreditAmt">$0 MXN</span></div>
  </div></div>
  <div class="totals-bar"><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Mano de Obra</div><div class="tv" id="sMO">$0</div></div><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Materiales</div><div class="tv" id="sMat">$0</div></div><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Subtotal</div><div class="tv" id="sSub">$0</div></div><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Utilidad</div><div class="tv" id="sUtil">$0</div></div><div class="ti"><div class="tl">Costo Financiero</div><div class="tv" id="sCredit" style="color:#f59e0b;">$0</div></div><div class="ti hl"><div class="tl">Total Servicio</div><div class="tv" id="sTotal">$0</div></div></div>
  <div class="actions-bar"><button class="btn btn-g btn-disabled">📄 Generar Cotización PDF</button></div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- ════ PLACEHOLDERS ════ -->
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="module" id="mod-polizas">
  <h2 class="sec-title">Cotizador de Pólizas de Mantenimiento</h2>
  <p class="sec-sub">Tratamiento de agua industrial — Cotización por activo y nivel de control.</p>

  <!-- PASO 0: Datos de la Cotización -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-h"><span>Datos de la Cotización</span></div>
    <div class="card-b">
      <div class="q-row">
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Folio</label><input class="f-input" id="polFolio" placeholder="252655"></div>
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Fecha</label><input class="f-input" id="polFecha" type="date"></div>
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Validez</label><input class="f-input" id="polValidez" value="30 DIAS"></div>
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Condiciones de Pago</label><input class="f-input" id="polCondPago" value="CREDITO AUTORIZADO"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="q-row">
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Atención a (Cliente)</label><input class="f-input" id="polCliente" placeholder="PORCELANA CORONA MEXICO (PLANTA RAMOS ARIZPE)"></div>
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Meses de contrato</label><input class="f-input" id="polMeses" type="number" value="12" min="1"></div>
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Presupuestado por</label><input class="f-input" id="polVendedor" placeholder="Jaime Bautista"></div>
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Email</label><input class="f-input" id="polEmail" placeholder="ventas@vecsawater.com"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PASO 1: Tipo de Póliza -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-h"><span>Paso 1 — Tipo de Póliza y Frecuencia</span></div>
    <div class="card-b">
      <div class="q-row">
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Tipo de Póliza</label>
          <select class="f-select" id="polTipo" onchange="polTipoChange()">
            <option value="visitas">A) Póliza por Visitas + HH</option>
            <option value="dedicado">B) Póliza con Personal Dedicado</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="fg" id="polFreqWrap"><label class="f-label">Frecuencia de Visitas</label>
          <select class="f-select" id="polFreq" onchange="polCalc()">
            <option value="1sem">1 visita/semana (4/mes)</option>
            <option value="2sem">2 visitas/semana (8/mes)</option>
            <option value="3mes">3 visitas/mes</option>
            <option value="2mes">2 visitas/mes</option>
            <option value="1mes">1 visita/mes</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Planta / Ubicación</label><input class="f-input" id="polPlanta" placeholder="Ubicación"></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Personal dedicado options (hidden by default) -->
      <div id="polDedicadoOpts" style="display:none;margin-top:0.6rem;">
        <div class="q-row">
          <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Técnico 48h/sem</label>
            <select class="f-select" id="polTecTipo" onchange="polCalc()">
              <option value="con_sup">Con supervisor en planta</option>
              <option value="sin_sup">Sin supervisor en planta</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Cantidad de Técnicos</label>
            <input class="f-input" id="polTecQty" type="number" value="1" min="1" max="20" onchange="polCalc()" oninput="polCalc()">
          </div>
          <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Supervisor en Planta</label>
            <select class="f-select" id="polSup" onchange="polCalc()">
              <option value="no">No incluir</option>
              <option value="1">Sí — 1 supervisor</option>
              <option value="2">2 supervisores</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Químico / Laboratorista</label>
            <select class="f-select" id="polQuim" onchange="polCalc()">
              <option value="no">No incluir</option>
              <option value="1">Sí — 1 químico</option>
              <option value="2">2 químicos</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PASO 2: Activos -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-h"><span>Paso 2 — Activos del Cliente <span class="count" id="polActCount">0</span></span></div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto">
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Categoría</th><th>Cant</th><th>Capacidad</th><th>Clasificación</th><th>Notas</th><th></th></tr></thead>
        <tbody id="polActBody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
    <div class="empty" id="polActEmpty"><div class="empty-ico">🏭</div>Agrega los activos del cliente</div>
    <div class="add-bar">
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Categoría</label>
        <select class="f-select" id="paCat" onchange="paAutoClass()">
          <option value="torre">Torre de Enfriamiento</option>
          <option value="ro">Ósmosis Inversa</option>
          <option value="chiller">Chiller</option>
          <option value="boiler">Boiler sin Vapor</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Cantidad</label><input class="f-input" id="paCant" type="number" value="1" min="1"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Capacidad</label><input class="f-input" id="paCap" type="number" step="any" placeholder="0" oninput="paAutoClass()"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Unidad</label><input class="f-input" id="paUnit" value="GPM" readonly></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Clasificación</label><input class="f-input" id="paClass" readonly></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Notas</label><input class="f-input" id="paNotes" placeholder="Opc."></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addPolActivo()">+ Agregar</button></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PASO 3: Equipos en Comodato -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-h"><span>Paso 3 — Equipos en Comodato (Renta Mensual) <span class="count" id="comodCount">0</span></span><button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="go('config');setTimeout(()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.cfg-nav-item')[5].click()},100)">⚙️ Catálogo</button></div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto">
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Equipo</th><th>Capacidad</th><th>Cant</th><th>Renta/Mes Unit.</th><th style="text-align:right">Subtotal/Mes</th><th></th></tr></thead>
        <tbody id="comodBody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
    <div class="empty" id="comodEmpty"><div class="empty-ico">🔄</div>Agrega equipos en comodato que provees al cliente</div>
    <div class="add-bar">
      <div class="fg" style="flex:2"><label class="f-label">Equipo del Catálogo</label>
        <select class="f-select" id="comodSel"><option value="">— Seleccionar —</option></select>
      </div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Cantidad</label><input class="f-input" id="comodQty" type="number" value="1" min="1"></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Notas</label><input class="f-input" id="comodNotes" placeholder="Opc."></div>
      <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addComod()">+ Agregar</button></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PASO 4: Desglose automático -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-h"><span>Desglose de Cotización</span><button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="polCalc()">🔄 Recalcular</button></div>
    <div class="card-b" style="padding:0">
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th style="width:40px">#</th><th>Concepto</th><th style="text-align:right;width:120px">Cantidad</th><th style="text-align:right;width:130px">Precio Unit.</th><th style="text-align:right;width:130px">Subtotal</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody id="polDesBody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Resumen agrupado -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-h"><span>Resumen Comercial (Agrupación Final)</span></div>
    <div class="card-b" style="padding:0">
      <table>
        <thead><tr><th>Grupo</th><th style="text-align:right">Mensual MXN</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr><td><strong>1. Mano de Obra / Servicio</strong><br><span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--txt3)" id="polMOdet">Visitas + HH</span></td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600" id="polGMO">$0</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>2. Análisis Físico-Químicos</strong><br><span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--txt3)" id="polANdet">—</span></td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600" id="polGAN">$0</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>3. Comodato</strong><br><span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--txt3)" id="polCOdet">Renta de equipos</span></td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600" id="polGCO">$0</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>4. Consumibles</strong><br><span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--txt3)" id="polCONdet">Lote mensual químicos</span></td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600" id="polGCON">$0</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-top:2px solid var(--border);background:#f8fafc"><td><strong>Subtotal Técnico</strong></td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:700" id="polSubTec">$0</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Admón. + Reportes + Riesgo (15%)</strong></td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600" id="polAdmin">$0</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Costo Financiero</strong><br><span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--txt3)"><input class="ind-pct-input" type="number" id="polCreditDays" value="0" min="0" style="width:60px" oninput="polCalc()"> días × 0.05% diario</span></td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--amber)" id="polCredit">$0</td></tr>
          <tr style="background:#f0f4f8"><td><strong>Total sin IVA</strong></td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--accent)" id="polTotalSin">$0</td></tr>
          <tr><td>IVA 16%</td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right" id="polIVA">$0</td></tr>
          <tr style="background:var(--dark);color:white"><td style="padding:0.8rem;font-weight:700">Total con IVA (Mensual)</td><td class="mono" style="text-align:right;padding:0.8rem;font-weight:700;font-size:1.1rem;color:#34d399" id="polTotalIVA">$0</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── DIAGNÓSTICO TÉCNICO ── -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-h">
      <span>Diagnóstico Técnico Actual</span>
      <button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="addDiagBlock()">+ Agregar Sección</button>
    </div>
    <div id="diagContainer">
      <div class="empty" id="diagEmpty"><div class="empty-ico">🔬</div>Agrega secciones de diagnóstico: calidad de agua, imágenes, observaciones, etc.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--txt2);font-style:italic;margin-top:0.5rem;padding:0.6rem;background:var(--amber-bg);border-radius:6px;">
    "La póliza se cotiza por activo y nivel de control, no por volumen de químico ni número de visitas."
  </p>

  <div class="actions-bar"><button class="btn btn-g" onclick="generatePolizaPDF()">📄 Generar PDF Cotización</button></div>
</div>
<div class="module" id="mod-dispensadores"><div class="placeholder"><div class="ph-ico">💧</div><h3>Renta de Dispensadores de Agua</h3><p>Este módulo estará disponible próximamente.</p></div></div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- ════ CONFIGURACIÓN ════ -->
<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="module" id="mod-config">
  <h2 class="sec-title">Configuración</h2>
  <p class="sec-sub">Administra catálogos, tarifas y parámetros generales de cada cotizador.</p>

  <div class="cfg-grid">
    <div class="cfg-sidebar">
      <div class="cfg-nav-label">General</div>
      <div class="cfg-nav-item active" onclick="cfgGo('general')"><span class="ci">⚙️</span> Parámetros Generales</div>
      <div class="cfg-nav-label">Catálogos</div>
      <div class="cfg-nav-item" onclick="cfgGo('cat-equipos')"><span class="ci">📦</span> Equipos (Proyectos)</div>
      <div class="cfg-nav-item" onclick="cfgGo('cat-indirectos')"><span class="ci">📊</span> Costos Indirectos</div>
      <div class="cfg-nav-item" onclick="cfgGo('cat-tarifas')"><span class="ci">👷</span> Tarifas (Servicios)</div>
      <div class="cfg-nav-item" onclick="cfgGo('cat-exponentes')"><span class="ci">📐</span> Exponentes Típicos</div>
      <div class="cfg-nav-item" onclick="cfgGo('cat-poliza')"><span class="ci">📋</span> Tabulador Pólizas</div>
      <div class="cfg-nav-item" onclick="cfgGo('cat-comodato')"><span class="ci">🔄</span> Catálogo Comodato</div>
    </div>

    <div>
      <!-- General -->
      <div class="cfg-panel active" id="cfg-general">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Parámetros Generales</span></div><div class="card-b">
          <div class="q-row" style="max-width:500px">
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Moneda Proyectos</label><select class="f-select" id="setCurrency"><option value="USD">USD — Dólar</option><option value="MXN">MXN — Peso</option><option value="EUR">EUR — Euro</option></select></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Moneda Servicios</label><input class="f-input" value="MXN" readonly></div>
          </div>
        </div></div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Ajuste CEPCI (Inflación)</span></div><div class="card-b">
          <div class="q-row" style="max-width:500px">
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">CEPCI Referencia (I₁)</label><input class="f-input" id="setCepci1" type="number" value="816" step="any"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">CEPCI Actual (I₂)</label><input class="f-input" id="setCepci2" type="number" value="866" step="any"></div>
          </div>
          <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;margin-top:0.4rem;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--txt2);cursor:pointer"><input type="checkbox" id="setUseCepci" style="accent-color:var(--accent);width:16px;height:16px"> Aplicar CEPCI a cotizaciones de proyectos</label>
        </div></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Catálogo Equipos -->
      <div class="cfg-panel" id="cfg-cat-equipos">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Catálogo de Equipos — Proyectos <span class="count" id="catCount">0</span></span></div>
          <div style="overflow-x:auto"><table><thead><tr><th>Tag</th><th>Descripción</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Flujo Ref.</th><th>Unidad</th><th>Costo (USD)</th><th>Factor n</th><th>Proveedor</th><th>Notas</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="catBody"></tbody></table></div>
          <div class="add-bar">
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Tag</label><input class="f-input" id="cTag" placeholder="E-101"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Descripción</label><input class="f-input" id="cDesc" placeholder="Intercambiador"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Tipo</label><select class="f-select" id="cType"><option value="tanque">Tanque</option><option value="intercambiador">Intercambiador</option><option value="bomba">Bomba</option><option value="compresor">Compresor</option><option value="torre">Torre/Columna</option><option value="reactor">Reactor</option><option value="filtro">Filtro</option><option value="caldera">Caldera</option><option value="otro">Otro</option></select></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Flujo Ref.</label><input class="f-input" id="cFlow" type="number" step="any"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Unidad</label><input class="f-input" id="cUnit" value="GPM"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Costo USD</label><input class="f-input" id="cCost" type="number" step="any"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Factor n</label><input class="f-input" id="cExp" type="number" step="0.01" value="0.6"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Proveedor</label><input class="f-input" id="cProv" placeholder="Alfa Laval"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Notas</label><input class="f-input" id="cNotes" placeholder="Opc."></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addCat()">+ Agregar</button></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Costos Indirectos -->
      <div class="cfg-panel" id="cfg-cat-indirectos">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Catálogo Costos Indirectos — Proyectos <span class="count" id="indCfgCount">0</span></span></div>
          <div style="overflow-x:auto">
            <table>
              <thead><tr><th style="width:55px">#</th><th>Concepto</th><th style="width:90px">Tipo</th><th style="width:80px">% Default</th><th style="width:110px">Monto Fijo</th><th style="width:55px">Cant</th><th style="width:40px"></th></tr></thead>
              <tbody id="indCfgBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          <div class="add-bar">
            <div class="fg" style="width:60px;flex:0 0 60px"><label class="f-label">Num</label><input class="f-input" id="iNum" placeholder="3.12"></div>
            <div class="fg" style="flex:3"><label class="f-label">Concepto</label><input class="f-input" id="iConcept" placeholder="Nuevo concepto indirecto"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Tipo</label><select class="f-select" id="iMode"><option value="pct">% sobre equipos</option><option value="fixed">Monto fijo</option></select></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">% Default</label><input class="f-input" id="iPct" type="number" step="0.1" value="0" placeholder="0"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Monto Fijo</label><input class="f-input" id="iFixed" type="number" step="any" value="0" placeholder="0"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Cant</label><input class="f-input" id="iQty" type="number" value="1" min="0"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addIndItem()">+ Agregar</button></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--txt3);margin-top:0.3rem;">⚙️ Los cambios aquí actualizan la tabla de costos indirectos en el Cotizador de Proyectos.</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Tarifas Servicios -->
      <div class="cfg-panel" id="cfg-cat-tarifas">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Catálogo de Tarifas — Servicios Generales <span class="count" id="tarifaCount">0</span></span></div>
          <div style="overflow-x:auto"><table><thead><tr><th>Rol / Concepto</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Tarifa Diaria (MXN)</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="tarifaBody"></tbody></table></div>
          <div class="add-bar">
            <div class="fg" style="flex:2"><label class="f-label">Rol / Concepto</label><input class="f-input" id="tRol" placeholder="Soldador especializado"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Tipo</label><select class="f-select" id="tTipo"><option value="personal">Personal</option><option value="transporte">Transporte</option><option value="herramienta">Herramienta</option><option value="alimentacion">Alimentación</option><option value="hospedaje">Hospedaje</option><option value="otro">Otro</option></select></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Tarifa Diaria MXN</label><input class="f-input" id="tTarifa" type="number" step="any"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addTarifa()">+ Agregar</button></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Exponentes -->
      <div class="cfg-panel" id="cfg-cat-exponentes">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Referencia — Exponentes Típicos por Tipo de Equipo</span></div><div class="card-b">
          <table><thead><tr><th>Tipo de Equipo</th><th>Rango (n)</th><th>Valor Sugerido</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <tr><td>Tanques de almacenamiento</td><td class="mono">0.50 – 0.70</td><td><span class="exp-chip">0.60</span></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Intercambiadores de calor</td><td class="mono">0.60 – 0.70</td><td><span class="exp-chip">0.65</span></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Bombas centrífugas</td><td class="mono">0.30 – 0.50</td><td><span class="exp-chip">0.40</span></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Compresores</td><td class="mono">0.70 – 0.80</td><td><span class="exp-chip">0.75</span></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Torres / Columnas</td><td class="mono">0.60 – 0.70</td><td><span class="exp-chip">0.65</span></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Reactores</td><td class="mono">0.50 – 0.70</td><td><span class="exp-chip">0.60</span></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Filtros</td><td class="mono">0.50 – 0.65</td><td><span class="exp-chip">0.58</span></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Calderas</td><td class="mono">0.60 – 0.80</td><td><span class="exp-chip">0.70</span></td></tr>
          </tbody></table>
          <p style="margin-top:0.8rem;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--txt3);">Fuente: Peters & Timmerhaus, Plant Design and Economics for Chemical Engineers. Los valores se pueden ajustar por equipo individual en el catálogo.</p>
        </div></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Tabulador Pólizas -->
      <div class="cfg-panel" id="cfg-cat-poliza">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Tabulador — Visitas y Mano de Obra</span></div><div class="card-b">
          <table><thead><tr><th>Concepto</th><th style="width:150px">Valor (MXN)</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <tr><td>Costo por visita</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabVisita" value="1000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Costo por HH</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabHH" value="1000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Técnico dedicado (con supervisor)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabTecCon" value="50000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Técnico dedicado (sin supervisor)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabTecSin" value="55000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Supervisor en planta</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabSup" value="65000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Químico / Laboratorista</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabQuim" value="55000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
          </tbody></table>
          <p style="font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);margin:1rem 0 0.4rem;">Tabla HH por Visita según Activos</p>
          <table id="tabHHTable"><thead><tr><th>Desde</th><th>Hasta</th><th>HH/visita</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="tabHHBody"></tbody></table>
          <div class="add-bar" style="border:none;padding:0.5rem 0 0">
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Desde</label><input class="f-input" id="hhFrom" type="number" min="1" placeholder="1"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Hasta</label><input class="f-input" id="hhTo" type="number" placeholder="99"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">HH</label><input class="f-input" id="hhVal" type="number" step="0.5" placeholder="2"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="addHHRow()">+ Agregar</button></div>
          </div>
        </div></div>

        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Tabulador — Análisis Físico-Químicos</span></div><div class="card-b">
          <table><thead><tr><th>Concepto</th><th style="width:150px">Precio/visita (MXN)</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <tr><td>Ósmosis Inversa (Conductividad + pH)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabAnRO" value="200" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Boiler sin Vapor</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabAnBoiler" value="450" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
          </tbody></table>
          <p style="font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);margin:0.8rem 0 0.4rem;">Torres / Chillers — Precio por activo por visita</p>
          <table id="tabAnTCTable"><thead><tr><th>Desde</th><th>Hasta</th><th>$/activo/visita</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody id="tabAnTCBody"></tbody></table>
          <div class="add-bar" style="border:none;padding:0.5rem 0 0">
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Desde</label><input class="f-input" id="anFrom" type="number" min="1" placeholder="1"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Hasta</label><input class="f-input" id="anTo" type="number" placeholder="99"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">$/activo</label><input class="f-input" id="anVal" type="number" placeholder="500"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="addAnTCRow()">+ Agregar</button></div>
          </div>
        </div></div>

        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Tabulador — Consumibles (Lote Mensual)</span></div><div class="card-b">
          <p style="font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Torres de Enfriamiento — VEC-313 + VEC-151</p>
          <table><thead><tr><th>Clasificación</th><th>Precio/mes (MXN)</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <tr><td>Pequeña (< 3 GPM)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConTP" value="2500" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Mediana (3.5 – 7.5 GPM)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConTM" value="3500" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Grande (8 – 12 GPM)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConTG" value="6500" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
          </tbody></table>
          <p style="font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);margin:0.8rem 0 0.4rem;">Ósmosis Inversa — VEC-SG11 + Cartuchos</p>
          <table><thead><tr><th>Clasificación</th><th>Precio/mes (MXN)</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <tr><td>Pequeña (< 9 GPM)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConRP" value="4000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Mediana (9 – 15 GPM)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConRM" value="6500" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Grande (16 – 25 GPM)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConRG" value="15000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>XL (> 25 GPM) — $/GPM</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConRXL" value="450" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
          </tbody></table>
          <p style="font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);margin:0.8rem 0 0.4rem;">Chillers — Inhibidor VEC-288</p>
          <table><thead><tr><th>Clasificación</th><th>Precio/mes (MXN)</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <tr><td>Pequeña (≤ 1 m³)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConCP" value="2000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Mediana (≤ 5 m³)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConCM" value="3000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>Grande (≤ 10 m³)</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConCG" value="6000" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
            <tr><td>XL (> 10 m³) — $/m³</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConCXL" value="450" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
          </tbody></table>
          <p style="font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt2);margin:0.8rem 0 0.4rem;">Boilers sin Vapor — Consumibles</p>
          <table><thead><tr><th>Concepto</th><th>Precio/mes (MXN)</th></tr></thead><tbody>
            <tr><td>Consumibles por boiler/mes</td><td><input class="ind-fixed-input" type="number" id="tabConBoiler" value="500" onchange="polCalc()"></td></tr>
          </tbody></table>
        </div></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Catálogo Comodato -->
      <div class="cfg-panel" id="cfg-cat-comodato">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><span>Catálogo de Equipos en Comodato <span class="count" id="comodCatCount">0</span></span></div>

            <table>
              <thead><tr><th>Equipo</th><th>Capacidad</th><th>Unidad</th><th>Renta/Mes (MXN)</th><th>Notas</th><th></th></tr></thead>
              <tbody id="comodCatBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          <div class="add-bar">
            <div class="fg" style="flex:2"><label class="f-label">Equipo</label><input class="f-input" id="ccEquipo" placeholder="Filtro lateral"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Capacidad</label><input class="f-input" id="ccCap" placeholder="15"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Unidad</label><input class="f-input" id="ccUnit" value="GPM"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Renta/Mes MXN</label><input class="f-input" id="ccRenta" type="number" step="any"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">Notas</label><input class="f-input" id="ccNotes" placeholder="1 por torre"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="f-label">&nbsp;</label><button class="btn btn-p" onclick="addComodCat()">+ Agregar</button></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- /container -->
